positive: A mesmerizing, stylized bioluminescent nebula scene featuring interconnected geometric flora and celestial patterns, rendered in a modern, clean illustrative aesthetic. The main subject is a symmetrical, central grouping of glowing lifeforms that resemble both constellations and deep-sea coral, casting an ethereal glow. Use a palette dominated by deep midnight blues, vibrant teals, electric purples, and sharp accents of cyan. The composition must be perfectly balanced and centrally composed, suitable for a repeat seamless pattern or a single large print on apparel. Lighting should be dramatic, coming solely from the bioluminescence itself, creating crisp silhouettes against the dark void. High contrast, graphic design quality, symmetrical layout, 8K, vector illustration style.
negative: blurry, grainy, text, logo, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, deformed, noisy, low detail, jpeg artifacts, muted colors, photographic, realistic photo, messy composition
